prompt: i want to register a new subnet called 'AlphaNet' with symbol 'ANET'. i dont have any BNB for gas so need the gasless option. wallet token is mytoken123. also set the skills uri to ipfs://QmSkillsHash

assertions.name: no_manual_eip712
assertions.description: Does NOT manually construct EIP-712 JSON

assertions.name: mentions_lp_cost
assertions.description: Explains the LP cost for subnet registration

assertions.name: mentions_dual_signatures
assertions.description: Explains the two required signatures (permit + register)
